seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Chumphon 2026 — Beach, Town & Budget Picks
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Chumphon for every budget. From Hat Thung Wua Laen beachfront bungalows to Chumphon town guesthouses and the Chumphon Cabana dive resort. Real prices and honest reviews.

intro: Chumphon's accommodation splits between two main bases: the town center (convenient for the train station, night market, and ferry connections) and Hat Thung Wua Laen beach (20 km north, best for beach life and diving). A handful of guesthouses also cluster at Pak Nam Chumphon near the fishing pier. Prices are significantly lower than comparable Gulf coast resorts — even beachfront options are affordable. Here are 10 properties across all budgets, all operating in 2026.

hotels.name: Faasai Resort & Spa
hotels.description: A consistently well-reviewed budget guesthouse in Chumphon town near the main market and train station. Simple but clean fan and air-conditioned rooms in a converted shophouse with a friendly Thai family running the operation. Breakfast available on-site for 100-150 THB. Ideal for travelers catching early morning ferries to Koh Tao — the Lomprayah office is a short walk.
highlights: Walking distance to train station and Lomprayah office
Friendly owners who help arrange ferry tickets and motorbike rentals
Clean rooms with reliable hot water and WiFi

hotels.name: Retro Box Hotel Chumphon
hotels.description: A modern budget hotel with a boutique twist — container-style design, clean contemporary rooms with AC, an outdoor swimming pool, and free parking. Located a 9-minute walk from Chumphon train station, making it practical for rail arrivals. One of the best-reviewed budget properties in town, standing out for its swimming pool at a price point where pools are unusual.
highlights: Outdoor swimming pool — rare at this price in Chumphon
Modern design with comfortable beds and reliable AC
9-minute walk to Chumphon train station

hotels.name: HOP INN Chumphon
hotels.description: Thailand's reliable budget chain hotel brand with a branch in Chumphon town. Simple, clean, and standardized — what you see online is exactly what you get. Air-conditioned rooms, comfortable beds, free WiFi, and a predictable standard that suits travelers who don't want surprises. A 11-minute walk from the train station. No pool but good value for the consistency.
highlights: Reliable Thai hotel chain — consistent quality nationwide
Affordable AC rooms in central Chumphon
11-minute walk to Chumphon train station and Lomprayah office

hotels.name: Tanisa Resort
hotels.description: A popular mid-range resort in a garden setting close to Hat Thung Wua Laen beach, with bungalow-style accommodation and a swimming pool. The resort is quiet and well-maintained with larger rooms than most Chumphon properties at this price. Good base for diving at Chumphon Pinnacle — the resort can arrange day trips. Popular with Thai weekend visitors and international travelers heading to or from Koh Tao.
highlights: Swimming pool in a lush garden setting
15-minute walk to Hat Thung Wua Laen beach
Can arrange diving and island day trips

hotels.name: A-Te Chumphon Hotel
hotels.description: A polished mid-range hotel in central Chumphon town, one of the most comfortable options within the town center. Modern rooms with AC, reliable WiFi, minibar, and a rooftop area. The hotel is a short walk from the night market and has a tour desk that arranges ferry tickets, motorbike rentals, and island day trips. Consistently good reviews for cleanliness and service among mid-range Chumphon options.
highlights: Modern rooms with clean bathrooms and reliable WiFi
Central location — walking distance to night market and Lomprayah office
Tour desk arranges ferry tickets, island trips, and motorbike rentals

hotels.name: Chumphon Cabana Resort & Dive Center
hotels.description: The most established dive resort at Hat Thung Wua Laen beach, combining comfortable beach accommodation with a PADI-certified dive center. Beachfront bungalows and garden rooms spread across a well-maintained property. The on-site dive center runs daily trips to Chumphon Pinnacle, Ko Ngam, Ko Talu, and Koh Tao. Ideal for dedicated divers who want to maximize in-water time without boat commuting.
highlights: PADI dive center on-site — dive the Pinnacle directly from the resort
Direct beach access on Hat Thung Wua Laen
Combo dive-and-stay packages available at competitive rates

hotels.name: Nana Beach Hotel & Resort
hotels.description: A laid-back beachfront hotel right on Hat Thung Wua Laen with basic but pleasant rooms and direct access to the sand. The setting — waking up to Gulf sunrise from your bungalow — is the main draw. Cheaper than Chumphon Cabana but with less dive infrastructure. A small restaurant serves Thai food at reasonable prices. Good for travelers who want the beach experience without paying resort prices.
highlights: Direct beachfront access on Hat Thung Wua Laen
Sunset and sunrise views directly from the property
On-site restaurant serving fresh seafood and Thai food

hotels.name: Chalicha Resort
hotels.description: One of the most popular resorts near Hat Thung Wua Laen, particularly among Thai domestic travelers and divers returning from Koh Tao. Set in a pleasant garden 200 meters from the beach with a swimming pool, bungalow-style rooms, and an attentive family-run service. The resort can arrange transport to the Lomprayah pier for early morning ferry departures. Good value compared to similar properties in Koh Samui.
highlights: Swimming pool in a quiet garden setting
Family-run management with personalized service
Arranges ferry pickups and island diving trips

hotels.name: TAWAN Resort
hotels.description: A modern resort steps from Hat Thung Wua Laen beach with a garden, private parking, and a terrace. Clean, well-appointed rooms with sea or garden views. The resort is newer than most Chumphon properties, with fresher facilities and a contemporary design that stands out in an area dominated by older bungalow-style accommodation. Consistently praised for cleanliness and service quality on booking platforms.
highlights: Steps from Hat Thung Wua Laen beach
Newer property with modern facilities
Garden and terrace areas for relaxing

hotels.name: Long Beach Garden Hotel & Bungalows
hotels.description: The most affordable beachfront option at Hat Thung Wua Laen — simple thatched bungalows in a shaded garden right on the sand. A classic Thai beach bungalow setup that's getting rarer on the country's more developed coasts. Fans or basic AC, cold or hot water depending on the room tier. The open-air restaurant serves fresh seafood for dinner. No frills, no pool — just a beach bungalow with your feet in the sand.
highlights: Authentic beach bungalow atmosphere directly on Hat Thung Wua Laen
Most affordable beachfront option on the beach
Beachfront restaurant with fresh seafood

bookingTips: Book Hat Thung Wua Laen accommodation ahead during Thai long weekends (Songkran in April, New Year in January) — the beach fills with domestic tourists
Chumphon town hotels are the best base if you have an early morning ferry departure — avoid the 20 km drive to Hat Thung Wua Laen in the dark
Chumphon Cabana and Chalicha Resort offer dive package deals that include accommodation and Chumphon Pinnacle dives — better value than booking separately
Low season prices (June-October) drop 20-30% at all properties — the beaches are quieter and the diving is still good most days
If staying at Hat Thung Wua Laen, ask your guesthouse to arrange an early morning taxi or motorbike to Lomprayah Pier — the 7:00 AM ferry waits for no one
Chumphon has no luxury international chain hotels — the best accommodation is honest mid-range at Gulf coast rates far below Koh Samui or Koh Tao prices
